title: Embodied Awakening
definition: The realization that enlightenment or awakening extends beyond the mental realm to the physical body.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The idea that the process of becoming aware and understanding yourself isn't just a mental exercise, but also involves changes in your body and physiology.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The understanding that enlightenment or awakening is not confined to the mind, but includes physical aspects such as altered brain function, pain processing, and emotional responses.
difficulty_levels.expert: A philosophical concept that emphasizes the embodied nature of spiritual realization, positing that the physical body plays a crucial role in the process of awakening and enlightenment, challenging traditional dualistic notions of mind versus body.

extra_fields.insight: You've essentially pointed toward embodied awakening — not an escape
